snippet.title: TennoCon 2026 | Warframe: Tau | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Prepare to step beyond the Origin System and enter Tau in 2026. 

Once a paradise built by the Sentients, Tau has been lost to war and ruin. Nowhere is this felt more keenly than on the black rain-soaked streets of Fornax, a colossal Sentient ring city. Here, the devastating downpour and its maddening influence run in rivulets from the heights of the Hunra's gambling dens, through the Docks, and into the most desperate Slums — where the residents have turned to the mind-altering Bloom in search of escape.

There, Albrecht Entrati awaits the arrival of the Tenno after conscripting the inner monologuing and noir-inspired Warframe, Brysko, to infiltrate the Hunra's criminal underworld — a final gamble to avert Fornax falling to those with nothing to lose.

Get ready to risk it all. Warframe: Tau arrives later this year. 

►► WHAT IS WARFRAME? 

Join 90M+ registered players in Warframe, a cooperative, free-to-play third-person looter shooter set in a constantly evolving sci-fi universe. For more info, visit https://warframe.com.

snippet.title: BÖHMI BRUTZELT – Staffel 5 Trailer German Deutsch HD 4K
snippet.description:
Ein Jahr lang war die Küche kalt, doch jetzt kehrt Deutschlands feinster Gaumen zurück an den Herd: „Böhmi Brutzelt“ ist zurück! Jan Böhmermann hat die kleine Pause genutzt und weltweit nach neuen Rezepten gesucht, die schärfsten Messer mit bloßer Hand geschmiedet und zwischendurch auch mal den Kühlschrank abgetaut. Der Mann hat Hunger – und weil allein kochen genauso viel Spaß macht wie allein einen Umzug „rocken“, hat sich der Sternekoch in spe einige Gäste in die Show-Küche eingeladen: Frau Gretel, Tim Mälzer, Bruce Darnell, Laura Larsson, Filiz Tasdan, Celo & Abdi, Maite Kelly sowie Caro Worbs sind dem Ruf der Küche gefolgt. snippet.title: Вольная дорога | Leons AISongs
snippet.description:
«Вольная дорога» — песня о свободе, дороге, внутренней силе и верности себе.
Ночная степь, костёр, гитара и дальний путь становятся символами жизни, где за спиной остаются испытания, а впереди всё равно горит свет.

Эта песня для тех, кто идёт своей дорогой, не сдаётся и хранит в душе огонь, несмотря на бури, потери и трудные повороты судьбы.

Музыка в стиле русского шансона с атмосферой дороги, свободы и искреннего мужского настроения.

Приятного прослушивания.

♫ Tame Impala, JENNIE - Dracula (Lyrics)
⭐ Download/Stream: 

🎤 Lyrics: Tame Impala, JENNIE - Dracula

[Intro: Tame Impala & JENNIE]
Oh (You and me)
Oh (Hahaha)
(Check it out now)
(Hahaha, mm)
(Dracula)
(Ba-da-bing, ba-da-boom)
(Dracula)

[Verse 1: Tame Impala, JENNIE, Tame Impala & JENNIE]
The morning light is turning blue, the feeling is bizarre (Bizarre)
The night is almost over, I still don't know where you are
The shadows, yeah, they keep me pretty like a movie star
Daylight makes me feel like Dracula (Dracula)

[Refrain: Tame Impala & JENNIE]
In the end, I hope it's you and me (You and me)
In the darkness, I would never leave (Never leave)
You won't ever see me in the light of day
It's far too late, the time has come

[Verse 2: Tame Impala, JENNIE, Tame Impala & JENNIE]
I'm on the verge of caving in, I run back to the dark (Dark)
Now I'm Mr. Charisma, fuckin' Pablo Escobar
My friends are saying, "Shut up, Jennie, just get in the car" (Hahaha; Jennie)
I just wanna be right where you are (Oh, my love)

[Refrain: Tame Impala & JENNIE, JENNIE, Tame Impala]
In the end, I hope it's you and me (You and me)
In the darkness, I would never leave (Never leave; I won't leave her)
We both saw this moment comin' from afar (Comin' from afar)
Now here we are (Here we are)

[Chorus: JENNIE & Tame Impala]
Run from the sunlight, Dracula
Run from the sunlight, Dracula
Run from the sunlight, Dracula (Run from the sun)
Isn't the view spectacular? (Dracula; Dracula)

[Verse 3: JENNIE & Tame Impala]
Hey, Kevin, what's up? (Haha)
Come pull up in my spot
Let's keep the night glowing
I don't ever wanna stop (Hahaha)
I'll never leave this floor, got me needin' more (Oh)
Sky is turning blue, let it clear the smoke
Lip-stain on the rim, bass is 'bout to blow (Oh)
Sinking in my teeth, I buy time

[Bridge: Tame Impala & JENNIE]
But please, do you think about what it might mean? (Mean)
'Cause I dream about you in my sleep
Would you ever love someone like me (Someone like me)
Like me? (Oh)

[Refrain: Tame Impala & JENNIE, JENNIE]
In the end, I hope it's you and me (Oh, my love)
In the darkness, I would never leave
We both saw this moment comin' from afar (Comin' from afar)
Now here we are (Here we are)

[Chorus: Tame Impala & JENNIE, Tame Impala, JENNIE]
So run from the sunlight, Dracula
So run from the sunlight, Dracula
Run from the sunlight, Dracula
Isn't the view spectacular?
So run from the sunlight, Dracula
Run from the sunlight, Dracula
Isn't the view spectacular? (Run from the sunlight, Dracula)
Run from the sunlight, Dracula (Run from the sunlight, Dracula)
Run from the sunlight, Dracula (Run from the sunlight, Dracula)
Isn't the view spectacular?

#TameImpala #Jennie #Dracula #Lyrics
